info.title: Videofly API
info.description: Videofly backend API for authentication, user management, video uploads, and video playback.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Current user profile and admin user management

tags.name: Upload
tags.description: Multipart upload workflow for video files

tags.name: Videos
tags.description: Video listing, detail, deletion, playback, and preview

post.summary: Log in with email and password

400.description: Validation failed or token is invalid
Validation failed or current password is incorrect
Validation failed or unsupported video type

post.summary: Mark a multipart upload as in progress

put.description: Uploader and admin only. Send raw bytes in the request body.

parameters.name: x-part-sha256
parameters.description: Lowercase SHA-256 checksum of the raw chunk.

200.description: Upload session updated with uploaded part

400.description: Upload is incomplete or cannot be completed

delete.description: Uploader can delete their own videos. Admin can delete any video.

get.description: Authenticated via bearer token or `token` query parameter. Supports HTTP range requests.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: JWT token alternative to the Authorization header.

parameters.name: Range
parameters.description: Byte range for partial content streaming.

get.description: Authenticated via bearer token or `token` query parameter.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: JWT token alternative to the Authorization header.

uploadQuotaBytes.description: Non-negative byte quota. The backend coerces numeric strings to bigint.
